Open Positions

Senior Python Engineer
San Francisco, CA (Hybrid) · Engineering · Full-time

Lead backend development for our battery management platform. You'll design APIs, build data pipelines, and mentor junior engineers.

Salary: $180,000 - $220,000

Product Designer
Remote (US) · Design · Full-time

Own the end-to-end design process for our customer-facing monitoring dashboard. Work directly with engineering and customers.

Data Scientist Intern
Austin, TX · Data Science · Internship

Summer 2026 internship. Build predictive models for battery degradation using real-world sensor data.

Stipend: $8,000/month
